settings.selectSection: Select a section on the left.
settings.readOnlyHint: Read-only — you lack permission to edit.

finance.patternHint: yy/yyyy = year, mm = month, dd = day, nnnn = running number (min. nnn). Example: RGyynnnn
finance.giroCodePxHint: Edge length of the GiroCode QR image on invoices, in pixels (0 = no GiroCode).

users.name: Last name
users.beaNewHint: The beA certificate can be uploaded once the user has been created.
users.resNewHint: Access is assigned once the user has been created.
users.groupsNewHint: Groups are assigned once the user has been created.
users.passwordNote: Creating a user does not set a password or grant login — do that separately in the desktop client.

groups.name: Name
groups.selectGroup: Pick a group on the left to edit its members.

folderTpl.name: Name
folderTpl.confirmDeleteFolder: Really delete folder "{{name}}" and all its subfolders?

customFields.hint: Custom fields are only shown when a label is set. Empty label = field hidden.

mvTags.selectTag: Pick a list tag on the left to edit its values.
mvTags.confirmDeleteTag: Really delete list tag "{{name}}" and all its existing assignments?
mvTags.confirmDeleteValue: Really delete value "{{name}}" and all its existing assignments?

caseNumbering.patternHint: YY/YYYY = year, M/MM = month, D/DD = day, nnn… = running number (min. nnn), NNNN… = global index (min. 4), RRR… = random number (min. 3), CCCC… = letter code (min. 4).
caseNumbering.extensionEnabled: Extend the case number with further parts

stirling.hint: Stirling PDF is a tool for working with PDF documents. It is installed separately and connected via a URL, e.g. http://localhost:9080/. Leave empty to disable the integration.

bea.hint: URL of the beA connector service, e.g. http://localhost:7080.

tsSettings.parallelWarning: Prompt when starting a parallel recording in the same case
tsSettings.parallelHint: Parallel recordings are always allowed; this option only controls the prompt.
tsSettings.inputHint: How a bare number (without 'h'/'m') is interpreted during manual booking.

bankCsv.name: Name
bankCsv.columnsHint: Column number (0-based) of each field in the CSV file.

carddav.scopeHint: Only contacts linked to at least one case are synchronized.
carddav.runHint: Pushes all case-linked contacts to the selected address book. Runs in the background.
carddav.syncStarted: Synchronization started and runs in the background.

searchIndex.reindexStarted: The rebuild has started and runs in the background. The numbers update gradually.
searchIndex.hint: The rebuild recreates the full-text search index from scratch and runs in the background for a while depending on the amount of data.

backup.encryptionHint: Warning: changing the encryption password deletes the current server backup (it could no longer be restored with the new password).

aiServer.name: Name
aiServer.histMonth: Last month: {{count}} requests · {{total}} tokens · avg {{perDay}} tokens/day

aiPrompt.name: Name
aiPrompt.paramsNoModel: Select a model to see its configurable parameters.
aiPrompt.paramsNone: This model has no configurable parameters.

mailbox.hint: This mailbox sends administrative (e.g. backup) and business (e.g. deadline reminder) notifications.
mailbox.testOk: Test message sent — please check the inbox.

security.hint: Complex = at least 8 characters with a digit, a lower- and upper-case letter and a special character.

profile.title: User profile
profile.emailMissing: No e-mail address is configured in user administration.
profile.passwordHint: After changing the password you will need to sign in again.
profile.passwordComplexity: At least 8 characters with a digit, a lower- and an upper-case letter and a special character (-_@#$%^&+=).
profile.warnUnknownSenders: warn before opening e-mails from unknown senders

notify.imMention: I was mentioned in an instant message
notify.imMentionDone: an instant message I sent was marked as done
notify.calendarEntry: a calendar entry was created or changed for me
notify.calendarEntryAuthored: a calendar entry I created was changed / completed by others
notify.calendarEntryReminder: one of my appointments is about to start
notify.invoiceDue: an invoice in one of my cases is due

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your j-lawyer credentials.
auth.error: Sign-in failed. Please check your username and password.

placeholder.body: This module is being delivered in phases. The shell, design system and routing are in place; the functional content follows.
